name: terminal
description: Run shell commands (foreground or background) with the working directory confined to the user's accessible repositories. Background processes are managed with list/read/kill tools.

configSchema.label: Limits
configSchema.hint: Output size and timeout caps for shell commands.

configSchema.label: Output cap
configSchema.hint: How many characters of stdout/stderr are returned before truncation. Also caps the rolling output buffer kept for background processes.

configSchema.label: Command timeout (ms)
configSchema.hint: How long a foreground command may run before it is killed.
